scripts.build:vercel: pnpm -C artifacts/api-server run build && pnpm -C artifacts/aqary run build:web
scripts.build:web: pnpm -C artifacts/api-server run build && pnpm -C artifacts/aqary run build
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
